query: SELECT cp.id, cp.aeId, cp.dealId, cp.payoutMonth, cp.payoutYear, cp.netCommissionGbp, d.customerName FROM commission_payouts cp LEFT JOIN deals d ON cp.dealId = d.id WHERE cp.aeId = 2 LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4ELZY9nPkashd2p.root --database gAuoMoig6vkmXbQaeq6Bo3 --execute SELECT cp.id, cp.aeId, cp.dealId, cp.payoutMonth, cp.payoutYear, cp.netCommissionGbp, d.customerName FROM commission_payouts cp LEFT JOIN deals d ON cp.dealId = d.id WHERE cp.aeId = 2 LIMIT 20;
